codeReview.summary: The new `docs/code-review/remediation-backlog.md` is well-structured and does cover the risk-register IDs, but the feature commit only added the backlog file. It did not update `docs/code-review/README.md`, so current HEAD still says `remediation-backlog.md` is the only remaining planned artifact and does not link the new document. That regresses the cross-area synthesis contract because the review index no longer links every produced artifact after the backlog landed.

issues.description: After `docs/code-review/remediation-backlog.md` was added, `docs/code-review/README.md` was left stale: it still says the backlog is a remaining planned artifact and omits a link to it, so current HEAD no longer satisfies VAL-CROSS-001's requirement that the review index link every produced review artifact and reflect the final review structure.

summary: FAIL. The backlog document itself is strong, but adding it without refreshing the review index leaves the governance-review docs internally inconsistent and blocks the cross-area contract from passing on current HEAD.
